name: jcapturelab-root
description: Monorepo root; Next.js app is in web/. Render should use root with Build: npm run build, Start: npm run start.

scripts.sync-photos: mkdir -p web/public/portfolio && cp -R photos/. web/public/portfolio/ && cp logo/logo.png web/public/logo.png && cp logo/cropped.png web/public/cropped.png && cp logo/cropped.png web/app/icon.png
